books.title: The Two Gentlemen of Verona
books.author: William Shakespeare
books.summary: Two best friends become involved in a love triangle.

books.title: Bellarion the Fortunate
books.author: Rafael Sabatini
books.summary: An orphan develops his talents in intrigue, romance, and war in fifteenth-century Italy.

books.title: The Education of Henry Adams
books.author: Henry Adams
books.summary: A prominent and caustic historian reflects on the reasons that “the more he was educated, the less he understood,” and what he believes the future holds for American society.

books.title: Recollections of Full Years
books.author: Helen Herron Taft
books.summary: Helen Herron Taft, wife of William Howard Taft, the twenty-seventh President of the United States, recalls her life married to one of America’s most influential political figures.

books.title: The Adventures of Pinocchio
books.author: Carlo Collodi
books.summary: A wooden puppet comes to life and goes on adventures.

books.title: Mr. Mulliner Stories
books.author: P. G. Wodehouse
books.summary: A collection of short stories featuring the eccentric (and hilarious) Mr. Mulliner, who regales the patrons of the Anglers’ Rest with tales of his colorful and amusing relatives.

books.title: Macbeth
books.author: William Shakespeare
books.summary: An ambitious general murders the King of Scotland and takes the throne for himself—and then he must deal with the consequences.

books.title: The Roots of the Mountains
books.author: William Morris
books.summary: The peoples of the dales and woods must unite to defeat a foe intent on enslaving them.

books.title: Huntingtower
books.author: John Buchan
books.summary: A retired grocer seeking a change in his mundane life finds more than he bargained for when he’s asked to aid in the rescue of an imprisoned Russian princess.

books.title: The Return
books.author: Walter de la Mare
books.summary: After visiting a graveyard, a man finds his appearance has mysteriously changed.

books.title: My Life in China and America
books.author: Yung Wing
books.summary: A Chinese-American graduate of Yale recounts his experiences as a student and civil servant.

books.title: The Brooklyn Murders
books.author: G. D. H. Cole
books.summary: Scotland Yard and a pair of amateur sleuths investigate the case of two heirs to a fortune who apparently murdered each other.

books.title: The Federalist Papers
books.author: Alexander Hamilton
books.summary: Eighty-five articles written by a group of U.S. Founding Fathers on why the proposed U.S. Constitution should be approved.

books.title: Principia Ethica
books.author: G. E. Moore
books.summary: An analysis of the concept of good that diagnoses the history of ethics as being marred by the “naturalistic fallacy” while discussing intrinsic goods and evils.

books.title: Poetry
books.author: James McIntyre
books.summary: A collection of poetry by James McIntyre.

books.title: Sunshine Sketches of a Little Town
books.author: Stephen Leacock
books.summary: A humorous account of life in the fictional small town of Mariposa.

books.title: First Lensman
books.author: E. E. Smith
books.summary: Virgil Samms, the first individual to receive a Lens from the mysterious and powerful Arisians, works to create the Galatic Patrol to protect all adherents of Civilization from the threat of the Boskonians and their masters, the Eddorians.

books.title: Short Fiction
books.author: Fyodor Sologub
books.summary: A collection of Fyodor Sologub’s translated short stories, ordered by date of the publication of their translation.

books.title: Festus
books.author: Philip James Bailey
books.summary: A man goes on a quest for knowledge, truth, and understanding in the face of the complexities of existence and spirituality.

books.title: The Path to Rome
books.author: Hilaire Belloc
books.summary: Hilaire Belloc takes a walking pilgrimage to Rome from his hometown in France, writing of the journey, sketching the sights, and digressing on a wide variety of subjects.
